tracks.rawText: 3:52Aguante Oscurov5.5CoverA solo acoustic guitar piece, fingerpicked with a clean, bright tone, The guitar is likely a nylon-string classical guitar, given the warmth and sustain, The tempo is slow and deliberate, creating a contemplative and melancholic mood, The melody is intricate, featuring arpeggiated chords and single-note lines that weave together, The harmony is primarily diatonic, with occasional chromatic passing tones adding color, There are no discernible chord progressions in a traditional sense, but rather a continuous melodic and harmonic development, The piece is entirely instrumental, with no vocals or other instruments, The production is dry, with minimal reverb, emphasizing the natural acoustics of the instrument, The dynamic range is subtle, with slight variations in picking intensity, The overall structure is free-form, without clear verse-chorus divisions1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Aguante Oscuro

tracks.rawText: 4:03Aguante Oscurov5.5CoverA solo acoustic guitar piece, fingerpicked with a clean, bright tone, The guitar is likely a nylon-string classical guitar, given the warmth and sustain, The tempo is slow and deliberate, creating a contemplative and melancholic mood, The melody is intricate, featuring arpeggiated chords and single-note lines that weave together, The harmony is primarily diatonic, with occasional chromatic passing tones adding color, There are no discernible chord progressions in a traditional sense, but rather a continuous melodic and harmonic development, The piece is entirely instrumental, with no vocals or other instruments, The production is dry, with minimal reverb, emphasizing the natural acoustics of the instrument, The dynamic range is subtle, with slight variations in picking intensity, The overall structure is free-form, without clear verse-chorus divisionsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:37Aguante Oscurov5.5CoverRegional Mexican corrido tumbado built around a single dripping sound motif, with two acoustic 12-string guitars: bright requinto chromatic runs, double-stops, and percussive armonía off-beat strums, Tololoche drives a syncopated walking bass with heavy string slap, bass carrying the melody, and dry close-mic spoken male vocals with soft reverb, wide-open sparse mix1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 1:53[Rec] Apr 20 01:45:48v5.5CoverTrompetas e instrumentos de viento lead the track: muted trumpet call-and-response, tenor sax and trombone harmonies, sharp staccato riffs, and breathy sustained pads, Rhythm starts off-kilter with syncopated percussion, then locks into a steady groove as snare, kick, and bass tighten, with room reverb and subtle tape saturation1PublishRemix
